title: Elytra Trinket Updated
description: A Minecraft Fabric mod that adds the Elytra to the cape slot in the Trinkets API. Updated to 1.21.10+!
body:
# Elytra Trinket Updated

A Minecraft Fabric mod that adds the Elytra to the cape slot in the Trinkets API.

Requires the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and [Trinkets Canary](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets-canary).

This mod is just a fork of [Elytra Trinket](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra_trinket)
updated to Minecraft version 1.21.10+. 
I got tired of waiting for an update, so I did it myself.
